pass1_value.note: Personal Access Tokens are created by users via the Netlify account UI (Account Settings > Applications) without requiring human approval; Netlify offers a Free tier account signup per pricing page.

final_value.note: Netlify docs state that users create personal access tokens in the Netlify UI via User settings > Applications > Personal access tokens > New access token, which is self-serve and does not require human approval.

pass1_value.note: Documentation + self-service creation of personal access tokens on a free account allow immediate use of the REST API. OpenAPI spec available for integration tooling.

final_value.note: Netlify’s API documentation describes REST API usage and authentication via a self-created personal access token (Bearer token in Authorization header), enabling immediate programmatic access once a user has an account. Evidence: https://docs.netlify.com/api/get-started/
